This null result suggests a perfect spiritual connection where energy circulates without loss or accumulation at the boundary, symbolizing an eternal, unbroken cycle of divine power that an engineer might study as a model of ideal equilibrium.

Calculating the average real part over the disk area involves integrating the cosine of squared radius terms in polar coordinates, yielding a value that depends on Bessel functions or specific series expansions. This non-zero average density represents the shaman's belief that sacred potential permeates every point within the sacred circle, offering a tangible measure of spiritual presence that fills the void.
